மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

Match the words to their definitions.
පදයන් ඔවුන්ගේ අර්ථයන්ට ගැලපෙන්න.
சொற்களை அவற்றின் வரையறைகளுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen and speak the missing line during the pause and check your answer.
සංවාදයට සවන් දෙන්න, විරාමයක් පවතින විට අඩුව පවතින වාක්‍යය පවසන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර පරීක්ෂා කර බලන්න.
ஒலிப்பதிவைக் கவனிக்கவும், இடைவேளையின் போது விடுபட்ட வசனத்தைச் சொல்லவும், பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலைச் சரிபார்க்கவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Should I hire Mr Perera or Mr Fernando?
example_dialogues.text_b: I think you should hire Mr Fernando.
example_dialogues.text_d: Mr Fernando is more capable than Mr Perera.

example_dialogues.text_a: Should he study Python or Java?
example_dialogues.text_b: I think he should study Python.
example_dialogues.text_d: Java is more structured for long term projects.

example_dialogues.text_a: Should I swim in the lake or in the swimming pool?
example_dialogues.text_b: I think you should swim in the swimming pool.
example_dialogues.text_d: The swimming pool is shallower than the lake.

keywords.word_1: Able to do a task well or handle a responsibility successfully.
Very valuable or important, often because it is rare or limited.
Able to grow or be expanded without losing efficiency or control.
Working well with little waste of time, energy, or resources.
Having an edge or point that can cut easily.

dialogues.text_a: Should I invest in gold or silver?
dialogues.text_b: I think you should invest in gold.
dialogues.text_d: Gold is more precious than silver.

dialogues.text_a: Should we store the data locally or use cloud storage?
dialogues.text_b: I think you should use cloud storage.
dialogues.text_d: Cloud storage is more scalable than local storage.

dialogues.text_a: Should we continue with the manual process or switch to an automated process?
dialogues.text_b: I think you should switch to an automated process.
dialogues.text_d: The automated process is more efficient than the manual one.

dialogues.text_a: Should I use this road or that road to get to Kilinochchi?
dialogues.text_b: I think you should use this road.
dialogues.text_d: This road is wider than that road.

dialogues.text_a: Should we use the first container or the second container?
dialogues.text_b: I think you should use the second container.
dialogues.text_d: The second container is bulkier than the first one.

dialogues.text_a: Should I use an axe or a chainsaw to cut this tree?
dialogues.text_b: I think you should use a chainsaw.
dialogues.text_d: A chainsaw is sharper than an axe.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.

examples.sentence: The bus from Kurunegala _____ arrive late because there is heavy traffic near the town.

content.sentence: Should I __________ the starter again before checking the battery connections?
Why does this suspension system feel __________ stable than the older setup?
Are we going to __________ the damaged silencer with a reinforced aftermarket model?
Why did the speedometer show the __________ inaccurate reading during yesterday’s road test?
Can I __________ the wheel alignment to improve handling on uneven rural roads?
Is this diagnostic scanner __________ accurate in measuring engine faults than manual testing?
Will the upgraded brake system provide the __________ reliable stopping performance under heavy load?
Should I __________ the torque wrench before tightening the suspension mounting bolts?
Why did the engine __________ while we tested fuel delivery this morning?
May I __________ the exhaust clearance before installing the new silencer assembly?

activity_b.text: Should I test the starter again before checking the battery connections?
Why does this suspension system feel more stable than the older setup?
Are we going to replace the damaged silencer with a reinforced aftermarket model?
Why did the speedometer show the most inaccurate reading during yesterday’s road test?
Can I adjust the wheel alignment to improve handling on uneven rural roads?
Is this diagnostic scanner more accurate in measuring engine faults than manual testing?
Will the upgraded brake system provide the most reliable stopping performance under heavy load?
Should I use the torque wrench before tightening the suspension mounting bolts?
Why did the engine stop while we tested fuel delivery this morning?
May I check the exhaust clearance before installing the new silencer assembly?

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:

සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Questions.question: Why should trainees avoid paying large fees to recruiters quickly?
Questions.answer: Because scammers often pressure workers to pay before providing real documents.
options: Because fast payment guarantees faster visa approval.
Because scammers often pressure workers to pay before providing real documents.
Because overseas jobs never require any payment at all.

Questions.question: What is a warning sign of an unreliable job offer?
Questions.answer: The recruiter promises quick departure without clear documents.
options: The recruiter provides written contracts and clear documents.
The process includes verification through unofficial channels and provides clear documents.
The recruiter promises quick departure without clear documents.

Questions.question: Why should workers read contracts carefully before accepting a job?
Questions.answer: To understand duties, working hours, and salary conditions clearly.
options: To make the recruitment process more complicated.
To understand duties, working hours, and salary conditions clearly.
To understand the recruitment agency’s objectives.

Questions.question: What action can help workers protect themselves most effectively?
options: Accepting the first offer with the highest salary.
Trusting recommendations from social media and other trainees.

Questions.question: According to the workshop, which workers are most successful abroad?
Questions.answer: Workers who are skilled, informed, and cautious.
options: Workers who leave as quickly as possible.
Workers who are skilled and accept any available job.
Workers who are skilled, informed, and cautious.

activity_b.text: Workshop Speech: Protecting Your Rights as Skilled Workers
However, some workers have faced exploitation because they lacked information or made rushed decisions.
Our purpose today is to help you make safer, smarter choices.
The agent asked for a large upfront payment and showed unofficial documents.
After receiving the money, the agent stopped responding.
This experience was far more damaging than continuing local employment with lower pay.
After arrival, the employer assigned longer shifts, heavier work, and delayed salary payments.
The worker felt powerless because the employer held on to all his personal documents, including his passport.
This situation became more stressful and riskier than expected, even though the offer initially looked professional.
A genuine job opportunity usually requires interviews, written contracts, and clear explanations.
You must read contracts carefully and ask questions when something seems unclear.
Comparing options and seeking advice will always be more effective than acting alone.
The most successful workers are not only skilled, but also cautious, confident, and aware.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.
